CustomField.description: Set the log level for which a Google Chat notification will be sent in response to a Log Event. Whenever a Log Event is created and the level of the event is encompassed by the currently set Google Chat Log Level, a message is posted to the configured Google Chat space. Requires a Named Credential named RFLIB_GOOGLE_CHAT_WEBHOOK to be configured with the Google Chat Incoming Webhook URL. INFO and below are never sent to Google Chat regardless of this setting; WARN is the enforced minimum.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set the log level for which Google Chat notifications are sent in response to a Log Event. Valid values are NONE, WARN, ERROR, and FATAL. WARN is the minimum enforced level — INFO, DEBUG, and TRACE events are never sent to Google Chat. Requires a Named Credential named RFLIB_GOOGLE_CHAT_WEBHOOK.
CustomField.label: Google Chat Log Level
